programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: John "Falcon" Chapman (Michael Jai White) is an ex-marine driven by guilt and on the edge. He travels to Brazil to hunt down his sister's attackers and discovers an underground world of drugs, prostitution, and corruption ruled by the Japanese mafia.

programme.title: Dog Gone
programme.desc: A courageous boy battles a gang of bumbling thieves to rescue a dog carrying a fortune in stolen diamonds.

programme.title: Closer To God Jessicas Journey
programme.desc: A mother struggles to keep things under control as her daughter dies of cancer, her estranged father suddenly returns, and her faith in God is put to the test.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: The mayor of Detroit ends his business with the Russian mob when young women are abducted and turn up drugged and dead. The best detectives are put on the case. The Russians abduct the mayor's adult daughter as well for leverage.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: Far from home, far from safe, far from over.

programme.title: Farm To Fork To Love
programme.desc: A young and talented chef, ALICE (Meggan Kaiser), works as a sous chef at one of the top restaurants in New York. After a disastrous night serving a food critic, she receives an invitation to judge a food competition in honor of the prestigious annual fundraiser for the St. Andrew's Children's Hospital. Alice accepts the invitation despite the dismay of BRETT, her boss who is also her boyfriend. Once she gets to Kansas, Alice is surprised to find her former boyfriend in college, CHRISTIAN (Scot cooper), is amongst the judges. The cooking show and her reconnection with Christian will make Alice reconsider her calling and make her dreams come true.

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: From The Heart
programme.desc: Kathy Yoder has left her Amish ways and is a successful travel guide writer. When Kathy goes home to settle her dad's affairs, she's reminded of her life before she left the Amish community, including her old love, Isaac. Will Kathy decide to stay or return to her traveling lifestyle?

programme.title: Love's Portrait
programme.desc: Lily, a museum curator, discovers a painting that looks just like her and is sent to find where the painting came from and who painted it. She tracks the painting down to the post office it was sent from in Ireland. There she meets William and Saoirse, a brother-sister duo who run the post, and who offer her help and friendship on her quest. But William knows more than he's letting on. Will he reveal what he knows if it risks his growing relationship--and mutual love--with Lily?

programme.title: Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: The story of William "Buffalo Bill" Cody, legendary westerner, from his days as an army scout to his later activities as owner of a Wild West show.

programme.title: Alien Thunder
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice (Gordon Tootoosis), a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: Town Tamer
programme.desc: A gunfighter is hired to clean up a wild frontier town, but there are forces afoot who want to keep the town as wide-open as it is.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows
programme.desc: Lazar, a bounty killer, teams up with a young gunfighter to blackmail Barrett, a former bandit and mine owner. At the end of the day, the bounty hunter clashes with Barrett, but something goes wrong.

programme.title: Onegin
programme.desc: Eugene Onegin is a jaded and disaffected young man who leaves St. Petersburg unexpectedly when he inherits an estate from a wealthy uncle. Starring: Ralph Fiennes, Liv Tyler, Toby Stephens, Lena Headey, Simon McBurney, Jason Watkins

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Cinderella Pact
programme.desc: Nola, Deb, and Nancy are best friends who create a Cinderella Pact—a weight loss agreement using advice from "fairy godmother" newspaper columnist Bel.

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
programme.desc: A story of a rich Edwardian widow who marries a handsome Tuscan dentist but dies in childbirth. Her English family travel to Italy in order to bring the child back home to England, but are unprepared for what unfolds...

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: Jumanji meets The Mummy in this edge-of-your-seat action thriller, starring Kelsey Grammer (X-Men), Kellan Lutz (Twilight) and Bingbing Li (Transformers). In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, battling Chinese magic and flesh-eating spiders, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Casuals: The Story of the Legendary Terrace Fashion
programme.desc: As the 1980s began in Britain, under the radar the 'casual' had already arrived. The film includes recently-unearthed archive footage and gives insightful interviews with personalities like Peter Hooton, who were at the heart of the story at a time when football and fashion mattered more than corporate hospitality and sanitized stadiums.

programme.title: Iron Men
programme.desc: Behind the scenes and with the fans of West Ham United as they move to a new home after 112 years at Upton Park.

programme.title: Robert the Bruce
programme.desc: The story of the nobleman-turned-outlaw hero who was crowned king of Scots in the 14th century.

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: An American ambulance driver and an English nurse fall in love in Italy during World War I.

programme.title: A Propos De Nice
programme.desc: What starts off as a conventional travelogue turns into a satirical portrait of the town of Nice on the French Cote d'Azur, especially its wealthy inhabitants.

programme.title: Born To Be Wild (AKA Pride of the West)
programme.desc: A greedy land baron has shut down the dam that supplies water to the town of Indian Head. Two truck drivers race to get a truck loaded with dynamite to the dam so they can blow it, but must battle their way through a gang of armed thugs hired by the land baron to stop them.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chuck Scott gets a job as chauffeur to tough guy Eddie Roman but Chuck's involvement with Eddie's fearful wife becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: Mr Wong In Chinatown
programme.desc: A pretty Chinese woman, seeking help from San Francisco detective James Lee Wong, is killed by a poisoned dart in his front hall, having time only to scrawl "Captain J" on a sheet of paper. She proves to be Princess Lin Hwa.

programme.title: The Kid
programme.desc: On the streets of downtown Los Angeles, a woman and a young boy fight to protect something both highly valuable and extremely dangerous.

programme.title: La Signora Senza Camelie
programme.desc: A new starlet is discovered and has ups and downs in Italian films.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live-action movie feature, Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem by kidnapping the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's antidote and, with the help of a journalist, set out to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Easter
programme.desc: A canine (Mario Lopez) springs into action when three criminals try to sabotage a day care for dogs.

programme.title: People I Know
programme.desc: A press agent (Al Pacino) is lead into the murky world of political conspiracy and murder when his major client becomes embroiled in a huge scandal.

programme.title: Alter
programme.desc: Alter, a psychological thriller about a man who is convinced that he's found his childhood abductor, and is determined to get him to confess by any means necessary.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A couple on the brink of divorce decides to keep their marital woes secret as they help their daughter plan her wedding. As the two work together on the happy occasion, they soon discover that their own marriage might just be worth saving.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: Kay and Arnold are a devoted couple, but decades of marriage have left Kay wanting to spice things up and reconnect with her husband. When she hears of a renowned couple's specialist in the small town of Great Hope Springs, she attempts to persuade her skeptical husband, a steadfast man of routine, to get on a plane for a week of marriage therapy. Just convincing the stubborn Arnold to go on the retreat is hard enough – the real challenge for both of them comes as they shed their bedroom hang-ups and try to re-ignite the spark that caused them to fall for each other in the first place.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Kelly is a young, creative, ambitious events planner in New York City and quickly gaining a reputation as one of the best in the business. But when Joe, a stubborn, difficult, but influential website editor, hires her to organize his niece's 10th birthday party, Kelly quickly realizes that she may have just met her match.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Crazy Kind of Love
programme.desc: A newly single mother relies on her son and his carefree girlfriend to rebuild her belief in love, even if it is the crazy kind.

programme.title: Very Good Girls
programme.desc: EXCLUSIVELY AVAILABLE ON DIGITAL PLATFORMS. Best friends Lily (Dakota Fanning) and Gerry (Elizabeth Olsen), home for one last New York summer, make a pact to lose their virginity before leaving for college. But when they both fall for the same handsome artist (Boyd Holbrook) and Lily starts seeing him in secret, a lifelong friendship is tested.

programme.title: The Next Three Days
programme.desc: A family man finds his world turned upside down when his wife is convicted of murdering her boss.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: Two brothers prepare to go head to head in a mixed martial arts battle in order to win the prize money.

programme.title: The Next Three Days
programme.desc: A family man finds his world turned upside down when his wife is convicted of murdering her boss.

programme.title: Air Force One is Down: Air Force One is Down
programme.desc: [EPISODE 1/2] Alistair Maclean's highly charged novel is brought to life in this tense, international thriller. When a fearless Serbian General is captured and imprisoned for war crimes, his loyal soldiers hijack Air Force One, kidnap the President of the United Stated and demand the release of their General. A hair-raising, high-altitude, wall-to-wall action-adventure.

programme.title: Air Force One is Down: Air Force One is Down
programme.desc: [EPISODE 2/2] Alistair Maclean's highly charged novel is brought to life in this tense, international thriller. When a fearless Serbian General is captured and imprisoned for war crimes, his loyal soldiers hijack Air Force One, kidnap the President of the United Stated and demand the release of their General. A hair-raising, high-altitude, wall-to-wall action-adventure.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: How far would you go for the one you love? For the MacGregor brothers, that question becomes a life-or-death decision that tests their strength, courage, and sense of family. When Mia, the fiance of Roman MacGregor (Ashton Holmes: Revenge, A History of Violence), is abducted into a human trafficking ring, Roman and brothers Brendan (Shawn Ashmore: X-Men, The Following) and Deklan (Cole Hauser: Rogue,Olympus Has Fallen) decide to save Mia on their own. Theyre guided by Det. Avery (Bruce Willis: Die Hard, The Sixth Sense), the cop on the case whose sense of duty will be pushed to its limits and challenged by his colleague on the case Det. Brooke Baker (Sophia Bush: One Tree Hill, Chicago Fire). As the MacGregors sidestep official boundaries to rescue Mia, every second counts. But are they prepared for the ACTS OF VIOLENCE theyre about to experience?

programme.title: Glasshouse
programme.desc: Glasshouse is an original, haunting, and sexy sci-fi thriller, which stars Jessica Alexander (A Banquet), Hilton Pelser (The Kissing Booth trilogy) and Adrienne Pearce. Whilst a memory-erasing virus permeates the atmosphere - like airborne dementia, a family secures safety within an airtight glasshouse until a stranger disrupts their peace and stirs up a past best left buried.

programme.title: The Killer Trainer
programme.desc: A woman must defend herself after her personal trainer takes their relationship to dangerous levels. Starring Hannah Barefoot (2018)

programme.title: Precious Things
programme.desc: A mother must prove that her daughter is innocent of murder. Starring Victoria Pratt (2017)

programme.title: Hacker
programme.desc: A computer hacker must run from a covert group known only as "The Agency"

programme.title: The Many Faces Of Alice
programme.desc: A woman wakes up from a coma with no memory of her previous life. She soon uncovers some unpleasant truth about the woman she once was and must fight for redemption. Starring Anna Lise Phillips (2016)

programme.title: Stash House
programme.desc: A young couple think they've found their perfect home, until it gets invaded by a gang of ruthless criminals. Starring Dolph Lundgren (2012).

programme.title: A Love Yarn
programme.desc: Samuel heads to New Zealand to help sell his aunt's mill. Yarn shop owner Sophie has a plan that will save the mill, but can she convince Samuel? She soon discovers it's harder than it seems. (2020)

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: Aimee is always up for a good cause, so when the town's beloved Oak tree is set to be felled, she takes it upon herself to try and save it. But will her actions ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.title: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: Nikki is an aspiring chef who lands her dream job. After a rocky start, she grows closer to Paul, the head chef. Together, will they create the perfect recipe for love? Brendan Penny stars. (2016)

programme.title: Just The Way You Are
programme.desc: Married couple Jennie and Ian try to bring back the spark in their relationship.

programme.title: A Love Yarn
programme.desc: Samuel heads to New Zealand to help sell his aunt's mill. Yarn shop owner Sophie has a plan that will save the mill, but can she convince Samuel? She soon discovers it's harder than it seems. (2020)

programme.title: Above The Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world. After more than a decade of solitude and making a living in the shadows as a paparazzi photographer, Holly meets the one man who can see her, Shayne, a down-on-his-luck MMA fighter working as a bouncer. Holly discovers that it was one of her tabloid photographs that caused his downfall and that she must restore him to his former glory if she wants to regain a foothold in the world around her. With Shayne, Holly awakens to love but also to the reality that she bears more responsibility for her fate than she imagined.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The turtles have defeated their nemesis Shredder and are still forced to hide in the depths of the subway system. April brings them gifts to cheer them up and one of them is a time traveling device which takes the turtles and April back to feudal Japan. The turtles must fight to free the village and find a way home. Starring Elias Koteas ("Gattaca," "Shooter"), Paige Turco ("The Game Plan," "Invincible"), and Vivian Wu ("The Pillow Book," "The Last Emperor")

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen's romantic comedy A RAINY DAY IN NEW YORK tells the story of college sweethearts, Gatsby (Timothée Chalamet) and Ashleigh (Elle Fanning), whose plans for a romantic weekend together in New York City are dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns into showers. The two are soon parted, and each has a series of chance meetings and comical adventures while on their own.

programme.title: In the Name of the King: A Dungeon Siege Tale
programme.desc: A man named Farmer sets out to rescue his kidnapped wife and avenge the death of his son - both committed by the Krugs, a race of animal warriors controlled by the evil Gallian

programme.title: The Journey
programme.desc: After 40 years of "The Troubles" in Northern Ireland the leading players meet at St. Andrews to try and hammer out a final and lasting peace agreement. The success of the talks depend on loyalist firebrand Ian Paisley and a former IRA Commander Martin McGuinnness, two sworn enemies, agreeing to share power. With the talks in extreme crisis the pair are forced by circumstance, or perhaps fate, to take a car journey together. After a series of initial bitter exchanges, their conversation begins to shift and cracks emerge in their armour.

programme.title: The Architect
programme.desc: While trying to build their dream home, a couple's lives are turned upside down after hiring an obsessive architect who insists on building his ideal home not theirs.

programme.title: Skin
programme.desc: Skin is one of the most bizarre and moving true stories to emerge from apartheid South Africa: Sandra Laing was a black child born in the 1950s to two white Afrikaners, unaware of their black ancestry. Her parents were rural shopkeepers serving the local black community, who lovingly brought her up as their 'white' little girl. But at the age of ten, Sandra was driven out of white society. The film follows Sandra's thirty-year journey from rejection to acceptance, betrayal to reconciliation, as she struggles to define her place in a changing world — and triumphs against all odds.

programme.title: Kill Your Darlings
programme.desc: A murder in 1944 draws together the great poets of the beat generation: Allen Ginsberg, Jack Kerouac and William Burroughs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live action movie-length version of the famous four, The Evil Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem and kidnaps the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's Anti Mutant antidote and, with the help of a journalist, embark on an adventure to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: Superfast!
programme.desc: If you like cars…and you don\'t like going slow…then it\'s time to go fast and get furious. Undercover cop Lucas White joins Vin Serento\'s LA gang of illegal street racers as they plan to double cross LA\'s crime kingpin. The gang\'s outrageous wheel-spinning plan is as daring as it is ridiculous and will see them towing the whole damn restaurant, at crazy speeds, half-way across the city. But as Vin Serento says, \"It\'s not the car you drive... it\'s the driver who drives the car…who\'s doing the driving\”

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: France is in turmoil and a new, naive King finds himself manipulated by the evil Cardinal Richelieu (James Cosmo, Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan). With a corrupt commander of the royal guard by his side the Cardinal employs the expertise of the devious and wicked Milady de Winter in a plot to bring down the monarchy and drag the country into war. As France burns the Cardinal will take control. All that stands between them and victory are the remnants of an elite group who wore loyalty to crown and country.

programme.desc: A technical glitch during their rescue from a Wraith ship forces McKay and Cadman to co-exist inside McKay's body.

programme.desc: Teal'c is trapped in a virtual reality simulation, in which he must defend the base from a Goa'uld super-soldier incursion. To help him, O'Neill joins the game.

programme.title: Primeval: For The Birds
programme.desc: When Christine Johnson and the military invade the ARC, the team are forced to flee. They take refuge in an abandoned 1930s cabin in the woods, but it is not long before danger appears in the form of vicious Pliocene-era phorusrhacids or `terror birds'. Finding themselves besieged by the creatures, the team have nothing but their ingenuity and their bare hands to help them survive.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager: Non Sequitur
programme.desc: A temporal anomaly in the space-time continuum sends Harry Kim To the altar in 24th-century San Francisco.

programme.title: Merlin: Arthur's Bane
programme.desc: As dawn breaks across the icy tundra, Merlin and Arthur are close to exhaustion. With each tortured step, the fortress of Ismere looms ever nearer, and Merlin's fear intensifies as he wonders what game Mordred is playing and what powerful secrets Morgana and the druid Ruadan search for amongst its twisted catacombs. It seems like this time, not even Merlin can stop Arthur from walking right into the lion's den.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.: 3 Seventeen Year Olds
programme.desc: Hondo, his father Daniel Sr. and his teen charge Darryl confront the history of racial tension in Los Angeles between law enforcement and the Black community.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A wealthy older man drowns under suspicious circumstances in front of Jill Riley's tower.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After their plane crashes, two robbers attempt to retrieve their suitcase full of stolen money.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Several people are murdered by a mysterious man in make-up at the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie takes in a runaway whose life is threatened by her mobster boyfriend.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig and Mitch must stop an out-of-control party boat before it crashes into the Santa Monica pier.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: During a violent tropical storm, two escaped convicts shoot Garner and leave him to die.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig gets jealous when Mitch reunites with his and Craig's old flame.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie and Shauni rescue a child trapped in an armored car that's about to fall into the ocean.

programme.desc: Suzanne's reappearance puts Marcel in a very bad spot with his group leader.

programme.title: Ona Carbonell: Starting Over
programme.desc: In August 2020, Olympic artistic swimmer Ona Carbonell became a first time mother, an experience that reshaped her life overnight. At the same time, Ona embarked on an ambitious plan to compete at the Tokyo Olympics. The documentary follows Ona during these intense 11 months, where she must push the limits to extraordinary degrees both physically and emotionally. Up close to Ona, we share her everyday routines and challenges, from breastfeeding and playing with baby Kai to the intense training sessions with the National Spanish Team.

programme.title: My Decision, by Andrés Iniesta
programme.desc: “Very few people know what happened when I got injured. Few know that I had to make a momentous decision. Was it worth it to keep playing or was it time to call it quits?” The revealing documentary follows the legendary midfielder, Andrés Iniesta, as he faces a crucial decision after a career-threatening injury. A tale of a lifelong love affair with football, under threat by a cruel inevitability.

programme.title: Rumeysa: Walking Tall
programme.desc: Standing tall at 215.6 cm (7 ft 0.7 in), Rumeysa Gelgi's striking stature is matched only by her extraordinary inner strength. Born with the rare genetic mutation Weaver's Syndrome, life has not been easy for the world's tallest woman. Now, thanks to life-changing surgery, she's ready to travel to the USA for the first time and meet some of the world's most inspiring women. On this journey of self discovery, Rumeysa will share her story and learn from other incredible Guinness World Record title holders.

programme.title: SEVE
programme.desc: Seve Ballesteros was an artist, a golfing Picasso. He was a fighter against back injury, rivals on the golf course, a disintegrating swing, and finally cancer. He remains a legend, a multi-major champion and the man who made the modern Ryder Cup. This is his story, from members of his inner circle, other sporting greats and from himself via newly unearthed material.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Meet The Marsupials
programme.desc: Few countries have a more iconic representative in the animal kingdom than Australia and the marsupial. Marsupials were once found across the planet, but over time they found their way to the outback, leaving Australia as an ark carrying the future of pouch mammals. As varied as they are unusual, marsupials are a weird and wonderful mob of animals who carry their young in a pouch. Whether hopping, climbing or even airborne, marsupials are some of the strangest but most fascinating creatures you're likely to meet.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: The Royal Bengal Tiger is in it's most primeval form here in the Sunderbans. `The tangled mangroves along the tributaries of the river Ganga are one of the most fearsome forests of the World. The tigers could kill humans and eat them.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: The vet students meet for the first time and travel 7 hours to the remote clinic. We learn about their fears and insecurities -- fear of failure and the weight of responsibilities ahead.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters: Victoria Falls Part 2
programme.desc: Still at Victoria Falls, Kristina is treated to an aerial view of the Victoria falls. She gets up close and personal with prehistoric-looking beasts at the croc sanctuary, experiences some of the must-do tourist activities and has her first-ever encounter with endangered black rhino at the Stanley and Livingstone Private Game Reserve.

programme.title: Perfect Parenting
programme.desc: Childcare is a challenge, whether in the Pacific Ocean like a female octopus looking for a safe place to lay its eggs. Or high up in the Bornean rainforest, where mother orangutan teaches her kid the ways of the jungle. Some families are tightknit, like the matriarchal herds of female elephant roaming the dry lands of Namibia. Single mothers and fathers, same sex couples and whole colonies of sisters – all working hard to ensure their offspring's survival. Our planet's fauna is beautiful and multifaceted, as are the ways of animal parenting.

programme.title: Killer Whale: Fins Of Change
programme.desc: A remarkable story is unfolding in the Arctic. As the ice melts and the polar bear struggles to survive in a fast-warming world, another animal is moving into the northern regions of the planet – and it is starting to usurp the polar bear's dominant role. Welcome the new top predator of the Arctic: the killer whale.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Meet The Marsupials
programme.desc: Few countries have a more iconic representative in the animal kingdom than Australia and the marsupial. Marsupials were once found across the planet, but over time they found their way to the outback, leaving Australia as an ark carrying the future of pouch mammals. As varied as they are unusual, marsupials are a weird and wonderful mob of animals who carry their young in a pouch. Whether hopping, climbing or even airborne, marsupials are some of the strangest but most fascinating creatures you're likely to meet.

programme.title: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.sub-title: England: The Pilgrim's Way to Canterbury
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, the horrifying murder of Archbishop Thomas Becket of Canterbury led thousands of pilgrims to the south of England. Centuries later, the long-forgotten Pilgrims' Way is now enjoying a revival. The Pilgrims Way leads east to west cross-country from Winchester to Canterbury through the counties of Hampshire, Surrey and Kent.

programme.title: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.desc: In honour of the Archangel Michael, thousands of medieval Christians set off on pilgrimages to the famous mountain monastery of the Mont-Saint-Michel in the Atlantic Ocean. Today it continues to enchant millions of visitors each year. But the pilgrimage route from Rouen to the mountain abbey seems to have been forgotten: it leads through the depths of Normandy into rural France.

programme.title: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.sub-title: Switzerland, Italy: The VIA FRANCIGENA to Rome
programme.desc: For centuries, pilgrims have set off on the Via Francigena in the hopes of reaching the tombs of the apostles Peter and Paul in Rome. The ancient pilgrimage route leads through the imposing Alps to the Great St Bernard Pass and from there cross-country through Italy.

programme.title: Penguin City
programme.desc: In the middle of the Antarctic Ocean, an entire mountain range arises from the water: South Georgia, the nursery of the Antarctic. Hundreds of thousands of penguins, elephant seals, fur seals and their young overcrowd the beaches. The rough weather and the extremely difficult access to the island cause filmmaking to be an endeavor requiring much of the film crew around Roland Gockel and Rosie Koch and the state of the art cameras. A lot of patience and sensitivity over a period spanning some five years now offers unknown and poignant insights into the life of the King Penguins on South Georgia Island

programme.title: Animalistic
programme.desc: This documentary takes an intensive look at the relationship of humans and animals – the special bond, but also the problematic and contradictory nature of our relation with each other, from earliest domestication up until today. During the show, human and animal are supposed to meet, eye to eye, focused on our understanding and our actions. It centers around one species, one animal that we live with. Three humans get to share their perspective on the animal in question, tell their stories of their relationship. Through these stories we get to know how dogs, pigs or horses accompany our lives and influence them. Premium storytelling, visually innovative and emotionally touching – This is a persuasive mixture of information and entertainment. Moreover, the show provides us with an impulse to experience anew our lives with the animals in our surroundings.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow three young bears of different species – polar bears, brown bears and sloth bears (like Baloo, the Jungle Book Bear) – that inhabit dramatically varied landscapes as they find their way in the world. We look at how their mothers teach them the skills they need to survive and watch the many dangers they face. Their young lives are full of learning, moments of great tenderness and life-threatening drama. Over three years all of our bears, despite hardships and losses along the way, prove they have what it takes, they all have learned their bear essentials.

programme.title: Close up with Hippos
programme.desc: This nature documentary shows the many different sides of the Hippo's lives on one September day in two iconic African locations: the Masai Mara-Nationalpark in Kenya, also the setting for the largest annual animal migration on the planet – one and a half million wildebeests and zebras migrate from the Serengeti to Kenya during this time.

programme.title: Germany's Mystic Forest
programme.desc: 2.000 rivers and streams dig deep into the underground and transport their water into reservoirs or "Germany's Wild Amazon", the Wupper. These forests and rivers, together with heathlands and moors, are home to a diverse fauna. Martens, badgers, wild boars, hares, roe deer, and red deer, even black grouse and hazel deer find shelter in these parts. Wolves also have a dominant presence, not to mention those who live underground, such as lizards, bats, and snakes. Accompany us on a journey where we explore every corner of this rugged land. Climb underground into the Bergisches Land, through the vast hidden cave systems that sprawl far beneath the forests. There is also much to be discovered in the water, dive with us in crystal clear streams and rivers with their diverse flora and fauna.

programme.title: Bear Whisperer
programme.desc: Follow Bear Whisperer Steve Searles in Mammoth Lakes, California, where bears and tourists collide.

programme.title: Islands In A Desert Sea
programme.desc: In this documentary, discover the remote islands around Baja California, Mexico and their wildlife.

programme.title: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: With the onset of September, the waters of the Okavango begin to recede and the dry season begins to envelop the region in earnest. For many animals, finding food becomes a daily struggle.

programme.title: A Year in the Wild

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 11, Poland Part 2
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 12, Bosnia
programme.desc: it's been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let's see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 13, Romania
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It's an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There's only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there's going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 14, Gibraltar
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 15, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey's south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we'll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 9, Finland
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It's all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 1, Martinique
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.
